description: Execute V0.8-M3: Port the 'Archon 17' high-frequency development workflows into the team-agents-cowork YAML DAG format.
scope: 1. Create templates/workflows/ directory. 2. Write 17 YAML files mapping to the Archon default scenarios (e.g., assist, fix-github-issue, idea-to-pr, plan-to-pr). 3. Ensure the YAML nodes are structured to emit execution-contract intents for the L2/L3 dual-track gating system (as opposed to direct LLM API calls).
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of the Node.js/TypeScript DAG execution runner that processes these YAMLs at runtime. NO SubAgent review automation daemon logic (M4). NO removal of legacy tooling. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of standard M3 progression.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to write the actual DAG execution engine runtime.
Executing without an approved M3 contract.
